comments.comment: Jake Cooper from Millwall committed a foul.
Corner awarded to Millwall after Jack Stephens allowed the ball to go out.
Offside call against Millwall. Femi Azeez has been caught offside.
Missed opportunity. Ryan Leonard from Millwall attempted a header from the center of the box but sent it wide to the left.
Kuryu Matsuki from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
The opening half begins...
Kuryu Matsuki from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
The attempt is thwarted. Ryan Leonard from Millwall takes a right-footed shot from the middle of the penalty area, but it's blocked. The assist came from Alfie Doughty, who delivered a cross.
Corner awarded to Southampton after Jake Cooper allowed the ball to go out.
Léo Scienza from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in an attacking position.
Alfie Doughty from Millwall committed a foul.
Léo Scienza from Southampton has earned a free kick in the defensive area.
Tristan Crama from Millwall committed a foul.

A fresh offensive effort unfolds. Jack Stephens from Southampton takes a right-footed shot from outside the penalty area, but Max Crocombe from Millwall makes a save, diving to his left. The assist came from Taylor Harwood-Bellis.
Substitution for Southampton: Finn Azaz comes on to replace Léo Scienza.

Another offensive play unfolds. Thierno Ballo from Millwall takes a right-footed shot from the center of the box, but Gavin Bazunu from Southampton makes a great save, diving to his right. The assist came from Femi Azeez.

Opportunity squandered. Cameron Archer of Southampton took a right-footed shot from the right side of the penalty area, but it sailed over the crossbar and to the right. The assist came from Kuryu Matsuki.
Nathan Wood committed a foul against Southampton.
Kuryu Matsuki from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
Corner awarded to Millwall after a deflection off Taylor Harwood-Bellis.
Missed opportunity! Ryan Leonard from Millwall attempted a right-footed shot from the center of the box but failed to find the target following a corner kick.
Corner awarded to Millwall after a deflection off Cameron Archer.
Taylor Harwood-Bellis commits a handball foul for Southampton.
Corner awarded to Southampton after Zak Sturge allowed the ball to go out of play.

Missed opportunity! Léo Scienza from Southampton took a right-footed shot from the left side of the penalty area, coming agonizingly close to finding the net. The assist came from Taylor Harwood-Bellis following a corner kick.

A new offensive play unfolds as Femi Azeez from Millwall takes a left-footed shot from outside the penalty area. However, Gavin Bazunu, the Southampton goalkeeper, makes a save right in the middle of the goal. The assist came from Tristan Crama.
Corner awarded to Southampton after Tristan Crama allowed the ball to go out.
Missed opportunity! Jake Cooper from Millwall attempted a header from the middle of the penalty area but failed to find the target. The cross was delivered by Alfie Doughty following a corner kick.
Corner awarded to Millwall after a play by Elias Jelert results in a defensive error.
Jake Cooper from Millwall committed a foul.

Another offensive push! Taylor Harwood-Bellis of Southampton heads the ball from close range, but Max Crocombe, the goalkeeper for Millwall, makes a crucial save right in the middle of the goal. The assist came from Léo Scienza, who delivered a precise cross.
The second half is underway with the score still tied at Southampton 0, Millwall 0.
Cameron Bragg from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
Match interruption due to an injury to Tristan Crama from Millwall.
Tristan Crama from Millwall has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
Ryan Manning from Southampton committed a foul.
Missed opportunity. Thierno Ballo from Millwall attempted a left-footed shot from outside the penalty area following a corner kick.
Opportunity squandered. Femi Azeez of Millwall attempted a header from the center of the box but sent it wide to the left. The assist came from Jake Cooper, who also headed the ball.
Match is currently paused due to an injury to Femi Azeez from Millwall.
Corner awarded to Millwall after Elias Jelert allowed the ball to go out.
The pause has ended. They are set to resume play.
Tristan Crama from Millwall earned a free kick in the defensive area.
Tristan Crama from Millwall committed a foul.
Kuryu Matsuki from Southampton has been awarded a free kick in the defensive area.
The attempt is thwarted. Caleb Taylor of Millwall heads the ball from the middle of the penalty area, but it gets blocked. The assist came from Alfie Doughty, who delivered a cross.
Nathan Wood from Southampton has been shown a yellow card for committing a foul.
Macaulay Langstaff from Millwall earned a free kick in an offensive position.
Corner awarded to Southampton after Zak Sturge allowed the ball to go out.
Missed opportunity! Kuryu Matsuki from Southampton took a left-footed shot from outside the penalty area, but it went wide to the left.
Opportunity wasted. Léo Scienza from Southampton took a right-footed shot from outside the penalty area following a free kick.
The fourth official has indicated that there will be one minute of stoppage time.
Ryan Manning from Southampton was awarded a free kick in an offensive position.
The first half has concluded with the score tied at Southampton 0, Millwall 0.
The pause has ended. They are set to resume play.
Substitution for Millwall: Billy Mitchell comes on to replace Alfie Doughty.
Missed opportunity. Thierno Ballo of Millwall attempted a right-footed shot from the right side of the penalty area but sent it wide to the left. The assist came from Macaulay Langstaff.

Corner awarded to Millwall, following a save by Gavin Bazunu.

A fresh offensive push unfolds as Thierno Ballo from Millwall takes a close-range shot with his right foot. However, Gavin Bazunu, the goalkeeper for Southampton, makes a crucial save right in the middle of the goal. The assist came from Femi Azeez, who delivered a well-placed cross.
Substitution for Southampton: Caspar Jander replaces Flynn Downes.
Substitution for Millwall: Aidomo Emakhu comes on to replace Femi Azeez.

The attempt is thwarted. Jay Robinson from Southampton takes a right-footed shot from outside the penalty area, but it gets blocked. The assist came from Finn Azaz.

Opportunity wasted! Caspar Jander from Southampton attempted a header from the center of the box, but it sailed high and to the left. The chance was set up by Ryan Manning, who delivered a cross following a corner.
The attempt is thwarted. Tom Fellows from Southampton fires a left-footed shot from the right side of the penalty area, but it gets blocked. The assist came from Jack Stephens.

The attempt on goal is thwarted. Finn Azaz from Southampton takes a left-footed shot from the middle of the penalty area, but it gets blocked. The assist came from Adam Armstrong.
